summary: Feature Testing: User Roles System, User Management (Admin), WebSocket Notifications, Preview File with Mapping Suggestions. Backend: 18/20 tests passed (90%). Frontend: User Management page working correctly. ColumnMappingWizard.jsx is NOT INTEGRATED (unused component).

minor.issue: External WebSocket connection times out through ingress, works internally on localhost:8001. Infrastructure configuration issue, not code issue.

integration_issues.issue: ColumnMappingWizard.jsx is NOT INTEGRATED - the Suppliers.jsx imports and uses ColumnMappingDialog.jsx instead. The new wizard file exists but is never imported anywhere.

issues: BrowserRouter component warning about setState during render in Login component - minor React warning

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/auth/permissions without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/auth/permissions as admin returns role='admin' and full permissions
Backend: GET /api/users without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/users as admin returns user list (without passwords)
Backend: GET /api/users as non-admin returns 403
Backend: PUT /api/users/{id}/role as admin changes user role (viewer, user, admin)
Backend: PUT /api/users/{id}/role with invalid role returns 400
Backend: Admin cannot demote themselves (returns 400)
Backend: Non-admin cannot change user roles (returns 403)
Backend: DELETE /api/users/{id} as admin deletes user
Backend: DELETE /api/users/{nonexistent_id} returns 404
Backend: Admin cannot delete themselves (returns 400)
Backend: Non-admin cannot delete users (returns 403)
Backend: Viewer role permissions endpoint returns only ['read']
Backend: Viewer can read suppliers (GET /api/suppliers)
Backend: Viewer can read products (GET /api/products-unified)
Backend: POST /api/suppliers/{id}/preview-file endpoint works (returns columns, suggested_mapping, sample_data)
Backend: POST /api/suppliers/{nonexistent}/preview-file returns 404
Frontend: User Management page (/users) loads correctly
Frontend: Title 'Gestión de Usuarios' displays
Frontend: Role cards show counts (Administrador, Usuario, Visor)
Frontend: Users table displays all users with role selectors
Frontend: Role dropdown shows all 3 options (Administrador, Usuario, Visor)
Frontend: Delete buttons present for non-current users
Frontend: Current user marked with 'Tú' badge
Frontend: Suppliers page menu has 'Mapear Columnas' option
Internal WebSocket: ping/pong works on localhost:8001
action_items: CRITICAL: ColumnMappingWizard.jsx needs to be integrated - currently Suppliers.jsx imports ColumnMappingDialog, not the new wizard
Optional: Configure Kubernetes ingress to support WebSocket connections (wss://) for external real-time notifications
Minor: Fix React warning about setState in Login component during BrowserRouter render
critical_code_review_comments: ColumnMappingWizard.jsx exists at /app/frontend/src/components/ColumnMappingWizard.jsx but is NOT IMPORTED anywhere - Suppliers.jsx uses ColumnMappingDialog instead
Backend suggest_column_mapping function in suppliers.py correctly auto-detects CSV columns and suggests mappings
WebSocket manager in server.py correctly handles connection/disconnection and ping/pong
Role permissions system properly enforces admin/user/viewer access levels

success_rate.backend: 90% (18/20 passed, 2 WebSocket tests failed due to external ingress)

seed_data_creation: Created test users with TEST_ prefix during testing, cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: WebSocket works internally at ws://localhost:8001/ws/notifications/{user_id} - external wss:// connection through ingress times out. ColumnMappingWizard.jsx is a NEW file that needs to REPLACE the import of ColumnMappingDialog in Suppliers.jsx for it to be used. User Management page data-testids: users-title, role-select-{user_id}, delete-user-{user_id}. The preview-file endpoint returns suggested_mapping object for auto-detecting CSV column mappings.
rca_of_the_issue: ColumnMappingWizard.jsx was created but never integrated. The Suppliers.jsx file imports 'ColumnMappingDialog' from line 72. To integrate the new wizard: 1) Change import to ColumnMappingWizard, 2) Update component usage in JSX.
